policy: CSS cascade debt ratchet. Counts may stay at or below these limits; z-index declarations must use shared --wp-z-* layer tokens so stacking order stays reviewable.

important.description: Locks the current !important count so cascade exceptions do not grow silently.

transitionAll.description: Locks transition: all usage; new transitions should name concrete properties.

zIndex.description: Locks the total z-index declaration count while layering is centralized through tokens.

boxShadow.description: Requires every non-none box-shadow declaration to use a shared shadow token.

zIndexTokenless.description: Requires every z-index declaration to use a shared --wp-z-* token instead of raw magic numbers.
